title: allow safely rebased frozen archive evidence
rawUserRequest: 发现归档边界工单 rebase 到最新默认分支后，PR 门禁因冻结 Contract 的旧 baseCommit 被挡住；停止发布和重复 PR，先从根本上修正归档证据基线兼容规则，保留不可变历史证据并完成完整 PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程。

declaredIntent.summary: 允许安全 rebase 后的冻结 archive evidence 以历史 Contract baseCommit 参与 PR 校验，同时要求该历史基线是当前 PR base 的祖先、Start Receipt 一致且单工单 ownership 仍成立。

outOfScope: Starting or reordering planned Work Items

sources.reason: PR archive baseCommit guard that rejects safely rebased frozen evidence.
Regression coverage for archive base compatibility and fail-closed unrelated bases.
Frozen evidence whose historical base must remain immutable.
Start Receipt proves the frozen Work Item's original base.

riskAssessment.reason: Relaxing a base guard can admit evidence from an unrelated branch unless ancestor, receipt, and ownership checks remain fail closed.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root-cause process correction before resuming the frozen PR/release sequence.

preReviewWarnings: Historical archive base remains immutable; only the PR validation rule changes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A frozen archive Contract whose baseCommit is an ancestor of the current PR merge-base is accepted only with matching Start Receipt and existing archive ownership.
An unrelated or non-ancestor historical base remains fail closed.
Regression tests cover both compatibility and rejection cases without modifying immutable evidence.
PR preflight passes formatter, governance budget, and aggregate archive ownership checks.
guidelines: Require ancestor and Start Receipt evidence before accepting a rebased frozen archive.
Template repository only; do not apply template budgets to adopters.

intent.problem: check-ai-pr currently requires every new archive Contract baseCommit to equal the current PR merge-base. A Work Item archived before corrective PRs merged cannot rewrite its immutable Contract after its branch is safely rebased, so the strict equality rejects a valid sequential lifecycle.
constraints: Stop release and PR retries until the process correction is complete.
intent.rationale: The Contract base records historical Work Item provenance; PR validation should verify safe ancestry and receipt binding rather than force mutation of frozen evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized stopping release and correcting the root process before retrying the frozen PR.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

evidence: observed check-ai-pr rejection after safe rebase
